subject: Geography
title: The Sacred Ganges
description: A fast breakdown of The Sacred Ganges for builders.

hook.text: Over 400 million people depend on the Ganges for drinking water, farming, and faith.

buildup.text: Hindus believe bathing in the Ganges washes away sins. Millions visit every year.

discovery.text: Varanasi, on its bank, is one of the oldest continuously inhabited cities on Earth.

twist.text: The river is now one of the most polluted on Earth, choked with sewage and waste.

climax.text: India has spent billions trying to clean it, but the sacred river remains in crisis.

punchline.text: Holy water that millions won't stop drinking.

quiz.question: Why do millions of Hindus visit the Ganges?
options: They believe bathing in it washes away sins
It is the cleanest river in Asia
